description: arXiv:2509.24148v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Test-Driven Development (TDD) is a widely adopted practice that requires developers to create and execute tests alongside implementation. With recent advances in Large Language Models (LLMs), developers can shift from manually writing the code to defining tests as executable specifications and delegating code synthesis to AI agents. author: Yiran Hu, Nan Jiang, Shanchao Liang, Yi Wu, Lin Tan
